name: zoningAnalysis
_note: urban-planning.zoningAnalysis is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/urbanplanning.js, PATH-3 domainModules → registerLensAction 3-arg), reached only via POST /api/lens/run on the HYPHENATED key 'urban-planning.zoningAnalysis'. DETERMINISTIC pure-compute: applies a per-zone Floor-Area-Ratio to the lot size (commercial FAR 2.0, mixed 3.0, industrial 1.0, residential 0.5 default for unknown zones) → maxBuildableSqFt = round(lotSize × FAR). FAIL-CLOSED guard (landed 2026-06-27): lotSizeSqFt is now finite-checked — a non-finite value (Infinity/NaN/1e400) falls back to the 5000 default and a non-positive value collapses to 0, so maxBuildableSqFt can never be Infinity/NaN. The handler reads input from artifact.data, never the DB or network. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not enumerated/driven by the MACROS-based macro-assassin; pinned behaviorally by server/tests/urban-planning-lens-macros.test.js.
